'''Endorian blobs''' were primitive jelly-like creatures found in the [[Forest/Legends|forests]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. They were [[Color/Legends|green]] and had multiple small red [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], as well as a bigger central one, which they could spit out at a victim to attack it.<ref name="Super Star Wars: Return of the Jedi" />

{{Species-stub}}
